title: nuphar × spenneriana
intro: Nuphar × spenneriana, also known as the yellow water lily or spenner's water lily, is a hybrid aquatic plant that belongs to the Nuphar genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing swelling and relieving digestive issues, due to its active compounds like flavonoids and alkaloids. Herbal preparations of Nuphar × spenneriana include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas or applied topically to affected areas for treatment.
